text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, September 29. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: The kitchen sink area has a problem. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Good weekend progress on home projects. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
